channel.title: AI Feed
channel.description: Personal AI news podcast — marketing tools, business applications, and emerging tech. Curated and produced by Hermes AI Feed System.
channel.itunes:author: AI Feed

item.title: AI Feed — Marketing Focus 🎯 | Sun June 8
item.description: 12-item marketing deep dive: AI costs outpacing budgets, 74% adoption gap, 3 steps for AI agents, 80-90% of ad campaigns too complex for autonomous AI, guardrails for ad tech, The Economist builds two versions of the web, Liftoff IPO, YouTube Remix consent controversy, AI-powered ad scams, 25 tools in 25 weeks, Tokenpocalypse hits marketing, ChatGPT sends emails.

item.title: AI Feed — General AI News 🧠 | Sun June 8
item.description: 10-item news roundup: Trump admin eyes OpenAI equity stake, GitHub Copilot Tokenpocalypse, OpenAI solves 80-year Erdős conjecture, Microsoft Project Solara agent-first OS, Google Gemma 4 12B for laptops, Google–SpaceX $920M/month compute deal, Florida sues OpenAI, Apple WWDC Siri re-revamp, Meta Muse Spark & TBD Lab, OpenAI Lockdown Mode + policy shifts.

item.title: AI Feed — Marketing Focus 🎯 | Thu May 28
item.description: Marketing-focused edition: 74% of professionals call AI essential but companies lag behind. Build a self-running weekly marketing report with Claude. Turn case studies into client-ready videos with Synthesia. Uber COO says AI cost is hard to justify. Stanford study finds racial bias in AI hiring. Practical AI agents for agencies.

item.title: AI Feed — General AI News 🧠 | Thu May 28
item.description: DeepMind math breakthroughs, Google I/O agentic Gemini, Karpathy and Anthropic updates, Simon Willison on product-market fit.
